name: governance-preview-frontend-adapter
description: Preview-environment adapter: serves the MCP server (Streamable HTTP) on port 3000 under the platform supervisor. Production entrypoint is mcp-server/dist/index.js.

scripts.start: MCP_TRANSPORT=streamable-http MCP_HTTP_HOST=0.0.0.0 PORT=3000 GOVERNANCE_API_URL=http://localhost:8001 PYTHON_BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:8000 node ../mcp-server/dist/index.js
